components.title: UI menu callbacks
components.summary: Register Lua callbacks into patched egosoft menus so multiple mods can co-edit the same UI element. Loaded via sn_mod_support_apis Lua Loader.

symbols.name: menu.registerCallback
symbols.summary: Register a callback into a kuertee-patched menu hook (optionally with an id).

symbols.name: menu.deregisterCallback
symbols.summary: Remove a previously registered callback by id.

symbols.name: extensions.kuertee_ui_extensions.ui
symbols.summary: Lua_Loader path for kuertee customised menu Lua files.

components.title: Custom interact-menu action groups
components.summary: Add nested custom action/order groups to the interact menu (kuertee extension).

symbols.name: Interact_Menu_API.Add_Custom_Actions_Group_Id
symbols.summary: Register a top-level custom actions/orders group.

symbols.name: Interact_Menu_API.Existence_Query
symbols.summary: Detect whether the kuertee UIX is present at runtime.
